mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(pay_date, '%Y-%m') AS sale_month, SUM(amount) AS total_revenue, COUNT(pay_no) AS order_count FROM payment WHERE pay_status = 'SUCCESS' GROUP BY sale_month ORDER BY sale_month;
SELECT Count(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE ROLE != "ADMIN" AND status != "WITHDRAWN"
SELECT Count(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE ROLE = "PARTNER" AND status != "WITHDRAWN"

SELECT REVIEW_NO, USER_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, APPROVAL_STATUS, REG_DATE, COUNT(*) OVER() AS REVIEW_WAIT, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS POST_DAY FROM REVIEW WHERE 1=1
AND USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND approval_status = "WAIT"
AND approval_status = "APPROVED"
AND approval_status = "REJECTED"
ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
ORDER BY REG_DATE ASC
ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}

SELECT r.review_no AS reviewNo, r.user_id AS userId, r.title AS title, r.approval_status AS approvalStatus,
r.company_no AS companyNo, r.product_no AS productNo, r.res_no AS resNo,
r.external_name AS externalName, r.booking_source AS bookingSource, r.total_cost AS totalCost, r.receipt_name AS receiptName,
c.com_name AS companyName, p.product_name AS productName,
CASE WHEN r.res_no IS NOT NULL AND rs.res_no IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS reservationLinked,
DATE_FORMAT( rs.use_date, '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS reservationUseDate,
( SELECT MAX(pr.amount) FROM payment_reservation pr WHERE pr.res_no = r.res_no AND pr.pay_status = 'SUCCESS' ) AS linkedPaymentAmount
FROM review r
LEFT JOIN company c ON c.company_no = r.company_no
LEFT JOIN product p ON p.product_no = r.product_no
LEFT JOIN reservation rs ON rs.res_no = r.res_no
WHERE r.review_no = #{reviewNo}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE 1=1
AND USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND approval_status = "WAIT"
AND approval_status = "APPROVED"
AND approval_status = "REJECTED"

SELECT REPORT_NO, REPORTER_ID, TARGET_TYPE, CASE WHEN TARGET_TYPE = 'MEMBER' THEN TARGET_USER_ID ELSE CAST(TARGET_ID AS CHAR) END AS UNI_TARGET_ID, TARGET_USER_ID AS targetUserId, REPORT_TITLE, REPORT_CONTENT, ANSWER_STATUS, ACTION_STATUS, REG_DATE, COUNT(*) OVER() AS REPORT_WAIT, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS REPORT_DAY FROM REPORT WHERE 1=1
AND target_type = #{targetType}
AND REPORTER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (TARGET_USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR TARGET_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND REPORT_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND REPORT_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( REPORTER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR REPORT_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR REPORT_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND action_status = 0
AND action_status IN (1, 2) AND answer_status = 0
AND action_status IN (1, 2) AND answer_status = 1
ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
ORDER BY REG_DATE ASC
ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}
SELECT p.post_no FROM comment c JOIN comment p ON c.parent_comment_no = p.comment_no WHERE c.comment_no = #{commentNo} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE 1=1
AND target_type = #{targetType}
AND REPORTER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (TARGET_USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR TARGET_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND REPORT_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND REPORT_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( REPORTER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR REPORT_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR REPORT_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND action_status = 0
AND action_status IN (1, 2) AND answer_status = 0
AND action_status IN (1, 2) AND answer_status = 1

SELECT PP.PASS_NO AS passNo, PP.PASS_NAME AS passName, PP.PRICE AS price, PP.REVIEW_CNT AS reviewCnt, PP.IS_ACTIVE AS isActive, PP.REG_DATE AS regDate, PP.DESCRIPTION AS description,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PAYMENT_PASS PPS INNER JOIN PAYMENT P ON P.PAY_NO = PPS.PAY_NO WHERE PPS.PASS_NO = PP.PASS_NO AND P.PAY_STATUS = 'SUCCESS' ) AS soldCount
FROM PASS_PRODUCT PP WHERE PP.IS_ACTIVE = 1 ORDER BY PP.PASS_NO ASC
SELECT * FROM PAYMENT P INNER JOIN PAYMENT_PASS P2 ON P.PAY_NO = P2.PAY_NO WHERE PASS_NO = 1 AND PAY_STATUS = "SUCCESS" AND USER_ID = #{userId};
SELECT P.pay_no, P.user_id, P.amount, P.pay_status, P.pay_date, PP.pass_no, PP.item_name FROM payment P LEFT JOIN payment_pass PP ON P.pay_no = PP.pay_no WHERE P.pay_no = #{payNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE inquiry SET answer_content = #{answerContent}, status = 'DONE' WHERE inquiry_no = #{inquiryNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT M.USER_ID AS userId, U.NAME AS name, U.NICKNAME AS nickName, U.EMAIL AS userEmail, M.STATUS AS status, M.TEL AS tel, M.REG_DATE AS regDate, M.ROLE AS role, M.LAST_LOGIN AS lastLogin, U.WEDDING_DATE AS weddingDate, U.GENDER AS gender, CASE WHEN M.ROLE = 'USER' THEN 'USER' WHEN M.ROLE IN ('PARTNER', 'NPARTNER') THEN 'COMPANY' END AS targetType, R.reportCount FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN USER_DETAIL U ON M.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TARGET_USER_ID, COUNT(*) AS reportCount FROM REPORT WHERE ACTION_STATUS = 1 GROUP BY TARGET_USER_ID ) R ON R.TARGET_USER_ID = M.USER_ID WHERE 1=1 AND M.ROLE = 'USER'
AND M.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( M.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY reportCount DESC
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN USER_DETAIL U ON M.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE 1=1 AND M.ROLE = 'USER'
AND M.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( M.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND status = #{status}

SELECT M.USER_ID AS userId, U.NAME AS name, U.NICKNAME AS nickName, U.EMAIL AS userEmail, M.STATUS AS status, M.TEL AS tel, M.REG_DATE AS regDate, M.ROLE AS role, M.LAST_LOGIN AS lastLogin, M.previous_payment AS previousPayment, M.out_date AS outDate, U.WEDDING_DATE AS weddingDate, U.GENDER AS gender, U.marital_status AS maritalStatus, U.anniversary_date AS anniversaryDate, CASE WHEN M.ROLE = 'USER' THEN 'USER' WHEN M.ROLE IN ('PARTNER', 'NPARTNER') THEN 'COMPANY' END AS targetType FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN USER_DETAIL U ON M.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE M.USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN COMPANY C ON M.USER_ID = C.USER_ID WHERE M.ROLE IN ('PARTNER', 'NPARTNER')
AND M.ROLE = #{role}
AND M.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND C.COM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND C.CEO_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( M.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR C.COM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR C.CEO_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND M.status = #{status}

SELECT M.USER_ID AS userId, C.COM_NAME AS companyName, C.COM_EMAIL AS companyEmail, C.COM_TEL AS comTel, C.COM_ADDRESS AS comAddress, M.LAST_LOGIN AS lastLogin, M.STATUS AS status, M.REG_DATE AS regDate, C.CEO_NAME AS ceoName, C.BIZ_NO AS bizNo, M.ROLE AS role, C.registration_fee AS registrationFee, C.com_intro AS comIntro, CASE WHEN M.ROLE = 'USER' THEN 'USER' WHEN M.ROLE IN ('PARTNER', 'NPARTNER') THEN 'COMPANY' END AS targetType FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN COMPANY C ON M.USER_ID = C.USER_ID WHERE M.USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT p.post_no AS postNo, p.user_id AS userId, p.category, p.title, p.content, p.reg_date AS regDate, p.view_cnt AS viewCnt, p.like_cnt AS likeCnt, p.is_deleted AS isDeleted, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.post_no = p.post_no AND c.is_deleted = 0 ) AS commentCnt FROM Community_Post p WHERE 1=1
AND (p.category = '정보공유' OR p.category = '정보')
AND p.category = #{category}
AND p.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY regDate DESC
ORDER BY regDate ASC
ORDER BY regDate DESC
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Community_Post p WHERE 1=1
AND (p.category = '정보공유' OR p.category = '정보')
AND p.category = #{category}
AND p.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE community_post SET is_deleted = CASE WHEN is_deleted = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS report_count FROM REPORT WHERE TARGET_USER_ID = #{target_id} AND ACTION_STATUS = 1

select target_user_id AS targetUserId, r.killCount from( SELECT target_user_id, COUNT(*) AS killCount FROM REPORT WHERE ACTION_STATUS = 1 GROUP BY target_user_id) r where killCount > 1 ORDER BY r.killCount DESC
SELECT report_content, reporter_id, reg_date FROM report WHERE target_user_id = #{target_id} AND action_status = 1 ORDER BY reg_date DESC

SELECT REPORT_NO, REPORTER_ID, TARGET_USER_ID AS targetUserId, TARGET_TYPE, CASE WHEN TARGET_TYPE = 'MEMBER' THEN TARGET_USER_ID ELSE CAST(TARGET_ID AS CHAR) END AS UNI_TARGET_ID, REPORT_TITLE, REPORT_CONTENT, ANSWER_CONTENT AS answerContent, REJECT_REASON, ANSWER_STATUS, ACTION_STATUS, REG_DATE FROM REPORT WHERE REPORT_NO = #{reportNo}

SELECT target_id AS targetId, target_type AS targetType, action_type AS actionType, reason, admin_id AS adminId, reg_date AS banRegDate FROM ban_history WHERE target_id = #{target_id} AND target_type = #{target_type} ORDER BY reg_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ban_history ( target_id, target_type, action_type, reason, admin_id ) VALUES ( #{target_id}, #{target_type}, #{action_type}, #{reason}, #{admin_id} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE REPORT SET action_status = 1 WHERE report_no IN
#{no}
UPDATE report SET action_status = 1, answer_status = 0, answer_content = #{answerContent}, reject_reason = NULL WHERE report_no = #{reportNo}
UPDATE report SET answer_status = 1 WHERE report_no = #{reportNo} AND action_status IN (1, 2) AND answer_status = 0
mapper.select: SELECT p.pay_no AS payNo, p.user_id AS userId, p.amount AS amount, p.pay_status AS payStatus, p.pay_date AS payDate, ppp.pass_name AS passName FROM payment p JOIN payment_pass pp ON p.pay_no = pp.pay_no JOIN pass_product ppp ON pp.pass_no = ppp.pass_no ORDER BY P.pay_no DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}

SELECT r.res_no AS resNo, r.user_id AS userId, r.pay_no AS payNo, r.res_status AS resStatus, r.use_date AS useDate, p.product_name AS productName, pr.amount AS amount, pr.pay_status AS payStatus, pr.pay_date AS payDate, pr.refund AS refund, pr.refund_date AS refundDate FROM reservation r join payment_reservation pr on r.pay_no = pr.pay_no left join product p on r.product_no = p.product_no ORDER BY pr.pay_date DESC
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}

SELECT p.user_id AS userId, p.pay_no AS payNo, p.amount AS amount, p.pay_date AS payDate, c.com_name AS comName, c.registration_fee AS registrationFee FROM payment p JOIN payment_registration pr ON p.pay_no = pr.pay_no JOIN company c ON pr.company_no = c.company_no ORDER BY P.pay_no DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payment
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payment P JOIN payment_pass p2 ON P.pay_no = p2.pay_no
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation r join payment_reservation pr on r.pay_no = pr.pay_no left join product p on r.product_no = p.product_no
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payment p JOIN payment_registration pr ON p.pay_no = pr.pay_no JOIN company c ON pr.company_no = c.company_no

SELECT p.product_no AS productNo, p.company_no AS companyNo, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_details AS productDetails, p.original_price AS originalPrice, p.is_active AS isActive, p.img_url AS imgUrl, p.large_category AS largeCategory, p.medium_category AS mediumCategory, p.deposit AS deposit, c.com_name AS comName FROM product p LEFT JOIN company c ON p.company_no = c.company_no WHERE p.product_no = #{productNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon ( coupon_code, coupon_name, discount_rate, issue_type, max_issue_cnt, giftcon_image ) VALUES ( #{couponCode}, #{couponName}, #{discountRate}, #{issueType}, #{maxIssueCnt}, #{giftconImage} )
INSERT INTO pass_product ( pass_name, price, review_cnt, is_active, description ) VALUES ( #{passName}, #{price}, #{reviewCnt}, #{isActive}, #{description} )
mapper.select: SELECT p.pay_no, p.user_id, p.amount, p.pay_status, DATE_FORMAT(p.pay_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS pay_date, pp.pass_no, pp.item_name, pr.pass_name FROM payment p JOIN payment_pass pp ON p.pay_no = pp.pay_no JOIN pass_product pr ON pp.pass_no = pr.pass_no WHERE p.pay_no = #{payNo}

SELECT p.pay_no, p.user_id, p.amount, p.pay_status, p.pay_date, r.res_no, r.res_date, r.res_time, r.use_date, r.use_time, r.res_status FROM payment p JOIN payment_reservation pr ON p.pay_no = pr.pay_no JOIN reservation r ON pr.res_no = r.res_no WHERE p.pay_no = #{payNo}
SELECT p.pay_no, p.user_id, p.amount, p.pay_status, p.pay_date, pr.company_no FROM payment p JOIN payment_registration pr ON p.pay_no = pr.pay_no WHERE p.pay_no = #{payNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payment P JOIN payment_pass PP ON P.pay_no = PP.pay_no WHERE P.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COALESCE(U.remaining_count, 0) AS remainingCount FROM user_pass_wallet U JOIN pass_product P ON U.pass_no = P.pass_no WHERE U.user_id = #{userId}
